title: Historical Post-085 Simultaneous-Worker Execution Opening Or Defer Decision
historical_note: This packet records one bounded Olares Phase 5 post-publication simultaneous-worker execution-opening decision slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.
current_routing: use PROJECT_STATUS.md for the current residue-retirement lane and latest completed packets
use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this packet JSON only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier `olares-phase-5-086` simultaneous-worker execution-opening decision
objective: Decide whether to open the first explicit simultaneous-worker source/test pilot after Packet 085 publication, or defer/no-go without opening execution.
decision_summary: Packet 086 selects Branch Y: the lane is authorable in planning terms after Packet 085 publication, but the first simultaneous-worker execution pilot should not open in this tranche because no concrete paired apparatus and relay mutation objective has been separately selected. Opening two workers merely to exercise the machinery would create artificial source churn and would bypass the packet lane's normal requirement to name a bounded source/test objective before mutation.
defer_reason: Packet 084 readiness is authorability, not a concrete work item.
The current controlling authority defines ownership and abort rules, but does not select exact apparatus and relay mutation objectives.
A later simultaneous-worker execution packet remains authorable only after a separate packet names the paired bounded objectives and proves they fit Packet 082 ownership without shared-file need.
No source/test mutation is needed to record this truth.
preserved_authorable_state: A later explicit simultaneous-worker execution packet remains conditionally authorable if it preserves Packet 082 ownership and Packet 084 abort rules exactly.
The later packet must define exactly one apparatus worker and exactly one relay worker.
The later packet must name exact apparatus and relay objectives before mutation.

The later packet must preserve coordinator ownership of governance, integration, validation sequencing, publication/defer decision handling, publication, host reconciliation, static-surfaces validation, app-wide layout/style/config, package files, and lockfiles.
closed_boundaries: simultaneous multi-worker source/test execution in this tranche
next_packet_candidate: Olares Phase 5 087 - Packet 085 And Packet 086 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
sql_permission_note: This decision packet authorizes no database writes and no source/test execution, simultaneous multi-worker mutation, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
